hero.title: AC, Fridge, Stove, Washing Machine Repair
hero.subtitle: We Fix it Fast. We Fix it Right.

about.heading: Fast Repair Services in Jeddah
about.p1: Welcome to Al Jeddah Cooling Center, specialists in AC, washing machine, refrigerator and gas stove repair across Jeddah, with the highest levels of quality and professionalism.
about.p2: We understand that a broken air conditioner or any home appliance can significantly impact your daily comfort, especially in Saudi Arabia's high temperatures. That's why we offer fast and immediate 24/7 maintenance services.
about.p3: With extensive experience in professional maintenance, we carefully handle every brand and model modern and traditional. We use the latest tools to ensure accurate diagnosis and rapid repair, improving performance and extending appliance lifespan.

parallax.title: 20% OFF on 5 AC Cleaning
parallax.subtitle: Fair prices and a guaranteed fix.

ac.title: AC Installation & Repair
ac.desc: We maintain all types of air conditioners, including split air conditioners, central air conditioners, and window air conditioners. We address problems of poor cooling, water leakage, gas shortages, and electrical malfunctions to ensure the air conditioner returns to best performance.

washing.title: Washing Machine Repair
washing.desc: We provide repair services for all types of washing machines, including automatic and regular washing machines, while addressing circulation, water drainage, and programming problems.

fridge.title: Refrigerator & Freezer Repair
fridge.desc: We service all brands and models of refrigerators and freezers fixing cooling issues, compressor problems, gas refilling, thermostat faults, and ice maker repairs to keep your food fresh.

stove.title: Gas Stove Repair & Maintenance
stove.desc: We handle burner cleaning, ignition issues, gas leak detection, and full safety servicing for all types of gas stoves to ensure safe and efficient cooking.

why.title: Why Choose Us?
why.desc: We are a professional team of appliance technicians serving Jeddah. With years of hands-on experience, we provide honest pricing, quick response and quality repairs for every brand and model.

items.i3: Genuine parts and warranty on repairs

why.urgentDesc: Don't wait our technician will reach your door fast, day or night.

items.q: How often should I service my air conditioner?
items.a: Regular annual maintenance is recommended to ensure optimal performance and energy efficiency.

items.q: What can I do if my refrigerator is not cooling properly?
items.a: Check the temperature settings, clean the coils, and ensure proper ventilation around the device.

items.q: Is it normal for my washing machine to make unusual noises?
items.a: Unusual noises may indicate problems with the engine or bearings; consider professional inspection and repair.

items.q: Why is my gas stove burner flame uneven or yellow?
items.a: An uneven or yellow flame usually means clogged burner ports or incorrect gas to air mixture. This can affect cooking performance and may indicate a safety issue. Professional cleaning and adjustment is recommended.

items.q: How can I maintain my dryer for optimal performance?
items.a: Clean the lint filters regularly, check the vents for any blockages, and ensure proper ventilation to prevent fire hazards.

items.q: Can I fix my device myself or do I need to hire a specialist?
items.a: While simple tasks such as cleaning can be done independently, complex problems require professional expertise to avoid further damage.

cta.title: Book Your Repair Today
cta.subtitle: Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week

footer.tagline: Fast, reliable home appliance repair in Jeddah available 24/7.

servicePage.quickRepairDesc: From quick gas refills to complete installation, we solve all AC problems.
servicePage.quickServiceP1: Welcome to Al Jeddah Cooling Center, specialists in AC repair in Jeddah with the highest levels of quality and professionalism.
servicePage.quickServiceP2: We understand that a broken air conditioner can significantly impact your daily comfort, especially in Saudi Arabia's high temperatures. That's why we offer fast and immediate 24/7 maintenance services.
servicePage.quickServiceP3: With extensive experience in professional maintenance, we carefully handle every brand and model modern and traditional. We use the latest tools to ensure accurate diagnosis and rapid repair, improving performance and extending AC lifespan.
servicePage.24hEmergency: 24/7 emergency service. Clear pricing. Guaranteed repair.

serviceDetails.title: Our Services
serviceDetails.bookingDesc: Same day service in Jeddah 24/7. Clear prices and guaranteed repair.

split-window-repair.title: Split & Window AC Repair
split-window-repair.desc: Quick diagnosis and permanent repair for all brands and models.
split-window-repair.longDesc: Our technicians repair all types of split and window ACs from all known brands. From poor cooling and strange noises to complete breakdowns, we diagnose the problem on-site and complete most repairs the same day with genuine parts.
bullets: All brands: LG, Samsung, Daikin, Gree, Carrier, Midea, and more
Same-day diagnosis with clear pricing before work begins

installation-uninstallation.title: AC Installation & Removal
installation-uninstallation.desc: Safe, certified installation for new ACs with proper mounting.
installation-uninstallation.longDesc: Safe and certified installation of new split and window ACs with suitable wall brackets, copper piping, drainage, and electrical connections. We also perform safe transport and removal without damaging the unit.
bullets: Vacuum and pressure test with proper gas charging
Neat arrangement of cables, pipes, and drainage

gas-refill-leak.title: Gas Refill & Leak Repair
gas-refill-leak.desc: Freon refill, leak detection, and pressure testing.
gas-refill-leak.longDesc: Poor cooling is often caused by a Freon leak. We pressure-test the system, locate the leak, repair the pipe or coil, vacuum the system, and then refill with the appropriate gas (R22, R410A, or R32) per manufacturer specifications.

deep-cleaning-service.title: Deep Cleaning & Maintenance
deep-cleaning-service.desc: Coil washing, filter cleaning, and full service for better cooling.
deep-cleaning-service.longDesc: Annual deep cleaning restores cooling power and reduces electricity consumption. We wash the indoor coil, clean the outdoor condenser, wash the filters, sanitize the fan, and check gas pressure.
bullets: Indoor coil washing with chemical foam

electrical-pcb.title: Electrical & PCB Repair
electrical-pcb.desc: Repair compressor, condenser, thermostat, and circuit board faults.
electrical-pcb.longDesc: AC not working, tripping the breaker, or turning off quickly? We check the compressor, condenser, thermostat, relays, and main control board, then repair or replace the faulty part.
bullets: Repair inverter and main control board

water-leakage.title: Water Leakage Solutions
water-leakage.desc: Drain cleaning and indoor unit leak repair.
water-leakage.longDesc: Water leaking from the indoor unit is often due to a clogged drain or tilted unit. We wash the drain line, remove clogs, adjust the unit level, and re-seal the drain pan to stop leaks permanently.
bullets: Adjust unit level for proper drainage

drum-motor-repair.title: Drum & Motor Repair
drum-motor-repair.desc: Fix noisy drums, faulty motors, and replace bearings and belts for all brands.
drum-motor-repair.longDesc: Loud noise, drum not spinning, or burning smell usually indicate a motor, belt, or bearing issue. We disassemble the drum and replace bearings, seals, drive belt, then rebalance the washer.
bullets: Replace drum bearings and seal kit
Replace drive belt and motor carbon brushes

water-inlet-drainage.title: Water Inlet & Drainage
water-inlet-drainage.desc: Fix no-fill, no-drain, or leaks and replace the pump.
water-inlet-drainage.longDesc: Washer won't fill, won't drain, or leaking from below? We check inlet valve, drain pump, hoses, and clamps and replace any faulty part to stop leaks and restore proper cycles.
bullets: Check inlet valve and pressure switch

pcb-control-board.title: Control Board & Programming
pcb-control-board.desc: Repair circuit board, display, and program selector switch.
pcb-control-board.longDesc: Blank display, unresponsive buttons, error codes, or program stopping mid-cycle are all signs of a control board failure inside the washer. We thoroughly inspect the circuit board, test relays, resistors, and circuits, then repair faulty components or provide a suitable replacement board for your model. We also check the display, touch panel, program switch, and internal wiring to ensure all cycles work before leaving your home.
bullets: Check program switch and internal wiring

spin-vibration.title: Spin & Vibration Repair
spin-vibration.desc: Fix excessive vibration, no spin, and balance the drum and shock absorbers.
spin-vibration.longDesc: Severe vibration or no spin can damage the drum over time. We replace shocks, counterweights, and springs and balance the drum to stop vibration.

door-lock-seal.title: Door Lock & Seal
door-lock-seal.desc: Fix door lock and replace door gasket and hinges.
door-lock-seal.longDesc: Door won't close, cycle won't start, or water leaking from door? We replace the door lock, door gasket, and hinges for a tight, leak-free seal.

installation-setup.title: Installation & Setup
installation-setup.desc: Safe installation, level adjustment, water connections, and test run.
installation-setup.longDesc: New washer? We unwrap it, remove shipping bolts, level the unit, connect water hoses and drain, and run a full test cycle so it's ready to use the same day.
bullets: Remove shipping bolts and level unit

cooling-issues.title: Cooling Issues
cooling-issues.desc: Fridge not cooling? Check thermostats, sensors, and cooling system.
cooling-issues.longDesc: If the fridge runs but doesn't cool, we check thermostats, temperature sensors, defrost system, and evaporator fan, then fix the root cause—not just the symptom.

compressor-repair.title: Compressor Repair
compressor-repair.desc: Fix noisy compressor, starting issues, or replace compressor for all brands.
compressor-repair.longDesc: Loud buzzing, clicking, or fridge not running usually points to a compressor or relay issue. We check start relay, overload protector, and compressor and replace the required part with genuine components.
bullets: Replace start relay and overload protector

gas-refilling.title: Gas Refilling
gas-refilling.desc: Freon refill, leak detection, and pressure testing for fridges and freezers.
gas-refilling.longDesc: Weak cooling or warm freezer? We locate the leak, repair the line, vacuum the system, then refill with the right Freon for your fridge.

freezer-ice-maker.title: Freezer & Ice Maker
freezer-ice-maker.desc: Fix ice buildup, ice maker faults, and defrost system.
freezer-ice-maker.longDesc: Ice buildup in the freezer, no ice, or water pooling at the bottom usually means a defrost or ice maker issue. We service the defrost heater, water valve, and ice maker unit.
bullets: Ice maker unit and water valve

water-leakage.title: Water Leakage
water-leakage.desc: Clean drain pan, unclog drain, and replace door gasket.
water-leakage.longDesc: Water on the floor or inside the fridge is often from a clogged drain or damaged door gasket. We wash the drain, clean and re-secure the drain pan, and replace the door gasket for a tight seal.

electrical-pcb.title: Electrical & Control Board
electrical-pcb.desc: Repair displays, control boards, and electrical faults.
electrical-pcb.longDesc: Display not working, error codes, or flickering? We inspect the main control board, display board, and wiring to safely fix electrical issues.

burner-repair-cleaning.title: Burner Repair & Cleaning
burner-repair-cleaning.desc: Fix weak flames, clogged burners, and deep clean all stoves.
burner-repair-cleaning.longDesc: Weak or uneven flames are usually from clogged ports. We disassemble burners and deep clean ports and caps to restore strong, even blue flames on every burner.
bullets: Deep clean burner head and ports

ignition-spark.title: Ignition & Spark Issues
ignition-spark.desc: Fix auto-ignition, electric igniter, and switches.
ignition-spark.longDesc: No spark, weak spark, or constant clicking indicates an igniter, microswitch, or wiring issue. We inspect and replace the ignition module and switches for reliable one-click lighting.

gas-leak-detection.title: Gas Leak Detection
gas-leak-detection.desc: Safe leak detection, valve replacement, and full safety check.
gas-leak-detection.longDesc: Gas smell is an emergency. We perform a full leak check on hoses, valves, and connections and replace any faulty part, then finish with a clear safety check before leaving the site.
bullets: Soap test and electronic leak detection
Final pressure test and safety confirmation

knob-valve-replacement.title: Knob & Valve Replacement
knob-valve-replacement.desc: Fix broken knobs, stuck valves, and gas regulator.
knob-valve-replacement.longDesc: Stiff or broken knobs and stuck valves are unsafe. We replace knobs, control valves, and gas regulator with brand-appropriate parts.

deep-cleaning.title: Deep Cleaning & Service
deep-cleaning.desc: Deep clean the surface, grates, and burners to restore performance.
deep-cleaning.longDesc: Full deep cleaning of surface, grates, burners, drip trays, and control panel to restore performance, appearance, and extend stove lifespan.
bullets: Remove grease from grates and drip tray

installation-hookup.title: Installation & Hookup
installation-hookup.desc: Safe installation, gas line connection, and first run test.
installation-hookup.longDesc: Safe installation of new gas stoves with proper gas line connection, leak test, and first-run flame check so you can cook with confidence.
bullets: Connect gas line with certified fittings
Check flame and ignition on first run
